'''Thosa''', known to the rest of the galaxy as '''Draethos''', was the home [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Draethos/Legends|Draethos]] [[Species/Legends|species]], located in the [[Wyl sector/Legends|Wyl sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It had jagged, windswept [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]] and deep caves. It was an isolated world of [[Speciesism|xenophobic]] people.

With the recovery of the [[Holocron of King Nakgru]], [[Sorzus Syn]] discovered that the [[Sith Empire (Pre-Republic)|Sith Empire]] had [[Attack on Draethos|struck]] the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] world of Draethos at some point after the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] colonized the [[Stygian Caldera]].<ref name="BOS" />

During the [[Jedi Civil War]], Thosa was located within the [[Realspace/Legends|space]] controlled by the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]], returning to its isolation after [[Darth Malak]]'s [[Death/Legends|death]].
